parameters.formDescription: Type a topic + optional reference content; the workflow will generate, render and upload a YouTube Short.

values.placeholder: e.g. Indian boss in Monday morning meeting
Optional: paste a tweet, joke, news bit or notes the script should incorporate.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Set Config').first().json.openaiModel, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You write viral 30-50 second Indian relatable comedy scripts for YouTube Shorts. Output strict JSON only. Style: fast, meme-y, punchy, hook in first 3 seconds. Themes: office, college, parents, relationships, Mumbai locals, hostel life. Use Hinglish freely. No stage directions. Total script must be 70-110 words.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Topic hint: ' + JSON.stringify($('Resolve Input').first().json.topic || '') + ' (if empty, pick a fresh viral idea; if non-empty, the script MUST be about this topic).\nReference content / extra notes (optional): ' + JSON.stringify($('Resolve Input').first().json.content || '') + ' (if non-empty, weave the key facts, jokes or angle from this into the script naturally — do not just paste it).\nReturn JSON with keys: idea (1 sentence), script (full script as one string, 70-110 words), lines (array of 4-7 short subtitle-friendly lines covering the script in order, each <= 60 chars), search_terms (array of 3-5 single-word lowercase stock-video search terms relevant to the idea, e.g. office, traffic, student).' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Set Config').first().json.openaiModel, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You write high-CTR YouTube Shorts metadata for Indian comedy. Output strict JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Idea: ' + ($('Parse Script').first().json.idea || '') + '\nScript: ' + ($('Parse Script').first().json.fullScript || '') + '\nReturn JSON with: title (<=70 chars, viral, curiosity hook, can include 1-2 emojis), description (3-5 lines, SEO keywords, ends with hashtags), tags (array of 15-25 lowercase keyword strings, no hash signs).' } ] }) }}
